clinical_recommendation.dose_adjustment: Use caution. Consider 50% of usual codeine dose and monitor for analgesia. Alternative: non-opioid analgesics.
clinical_recommendation.cpic_guideline_reference: CPIC Guidelines for Codeine and CYP2D6 - https://www.pharmgkb.org/documents/pa164743470

llm_generated_explanation.summary: This patient has an intermediate metabolizer (IM) phenotype for CYP2D6, indicated by the *4/*10 diplotype. They have reduced enzyme activity and may experience suboptimal analgesia from codeine.
llm_generated_explanation.mechanism: CYP2D6*4 is a null allele causing complete loss of enzyme function, while *10 is a decreased function allele with reduced activity. The combination results in intermediate metabolizer status, reducing codeine-to-morphine conversion.
evidence: FDA Drug Label: Codeine (contains pharmacogenomic warning)

quality_metrics.notes: Successfully parsed VCF. CYP2D6 *4/*10 diplotype constructed from heterozygous calls at rs3892097 and rs1065852.
